SEARCH
Package microsim.file

Class ELF

java.lang.Object
microsim.file.ELF
public class ELF extends Object
Uses the jelf library to parse an ELF and read the correct segments into an EPROM array.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    private
    ELF()
    Hide constructor.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static void
    checkData(net.fornwall.jelf.ElfSegment data)
    Checks if the data ELF segment is valid, otherwise throws an exception.
    private static void
    checkElf(net.fornwall.jelf.ElfFile elf)
    Checks if the ELF header is valid, otherwise throws an exception.
    private static void
    checkRodata(net.fornwall.jelf.ElfSegment rodata)
    Checks if the rodata ELF segment is valid, otherwise throws an exception.
    static byte[]
    readEPROM(String path)
    Takes a path string and returns the corresponding EPROM byte array.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ELF

      private ELF()
      Hide constructor.

  • Method Details

    • checkElf

      private static void checkElf(net.fornwall.jelf.ElfFile elf) throws IOException
      Checks if the ELF header is valid, otherwise throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      elf - ELF header
      Throws:
      IOException - if header is invalid

    • checkRodata

      private static void checkRodata(net.fornwall.jelf.ElfSegment rodata) throws IOException
      Checks if the rodata ELF segment is valid, otherwise throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      rodata - rodata ELF segment
      Throws:
      IOException - if segment is invalid

    • checkData

      private static void checkData(net.fornwall.jelf.ElfSegment data) throws IOException
      Checks if the data ELF segment is valid, otherwise throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      data - data ELF segment
      Throws:
      IOException - if segment is invalid

    • readEPROM

      public static byte[] readEPROM(String path) throws IOException
      Takes a path string and returns the corresponding EPROM byte array.
      Parameters:
      path - path of EPROM data
      Returns:
      EPROM data array
      Throws:
      IOException - if fails to open file or parse ELF headers
